global_rules.philosophy: High-end Swiss Brutalism with Premium Touches. Unified single ecosystem. Replace fragmented multi-colors (purple, green, blue) with a unified monochromatic structure punctuated by a single powerful brand accent (Orange).
global_rules.backgrounds: Crisp White / 2% Zinc for Light mode, Obsidian for Dark Hero sections.
global_rules.data_testid_rule: MANDATORY on all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., buttons, inputs, links).

typography.rules: BANNED: Inter for headings. Use `tracking-tight` for H1/H2. Monospace strictly reserved for technical documentation labels, reference IDs, and code.

colors.hub_ecosystem_hover_logic: Instead of different colors per module, use unified structural cards with `hover:border-orange-500 hover:shadow-lg transition-all`.

layout_spacing.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for major containers. Prevent text collision by using proper inner padding on bordered containers.
layout_spacing.grid_hub: Bento Grid (Control Room Mode). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-6 or gap-8).
layout_spacing.border_radius: Subtle roundness (`rounded-lg` or `rounded-xl`). Avoid extreme pill shapes except for badges.
layout_spacing.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows `shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]`. No harsh drop shadows.

HomePageV7.instructions: Create 5 major clickable zones (Documentatie, Marketplace, Imobiliare, Forum, Servicii). Use a clean, monochromatic card base (`bg-white border-zinc-200`) with lucide-react icons. On hover, the border turns Orange and a subtle lift (`-translate-y-1`) occurs. Keep typography sharp and authoritative.

LandingPage.instructions: Hero Section: High impact. Overlay dark tint (`bg-zinc-950/70`) over the modern architecture image. Use `text-white` for hero text. Add trust signals (NTPEE 2018, ANRE badges) below the CTA using glassmorphism. Add a client logo banner (marquee or static grid) using grayscale logos.

DocumentatieIndustriiPage.instructions: This module has 179 fields. DO NOT use standard floating cards. Use a 'Technical Grid' (`border-collapse`). Sharp edges, 1px solid borders (`border-zinc-300`). Form labels must use `JetBrains Mono` uppercase. Form inputs must use Shadcn, flattened to integrate with the grid (no heavy focus rings, just a bottom orange border on focus).

AppShell_Sidebar.instructions: Remove all emojis. Replace with 20x20 `lucide-react` icons (stroke-width: 1.5). Group the 8 sections neatly. The active state should NOT have a full-width background color; instead, use `font-semibold text-zinc-950` with a sharp `border-l-4 border-orange-600` and a slight `bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-50 to-transparent`.

Marketplace_RealEstate_Forum_Servicii.instructions: Unify the design language across these 4 pages. Remove custom colors (emerald, violet, rose, etc.). Use identical list/grid structures, typography hierarchies, and filter sidebars. Differentiation comes from the content (images, data points), NOT the UI shell color.

SmartPricingCalculator.instructions: For the Servicii page. Create an elegant, technical calculator widget. Use slider inputs or segmented controls for the 5 factors. Highlight the final calculated price in large `Cabinet Grotesk` with an Orange accent.

hero_background.description: Modern architecture high-rise, suitable for dark overlay on public landing hero.

marketplace_placeholder.description: Premium warehouse logistics interior for marketplace/services background.

real_estate_placeholder.description: Aerial view of luxury mansion for Imobiliare ecosystem.

technical_blueprint.description: Pencil on blueprint, suitable for Documentatie or general tech services header.
